evt_009.label: Formal
evt_009.basis: Formal under Rule 2 because PetSmart received this final bid along with revised versions of the merger agreement and other transaction documents.

evt_010.label: Formal
evt_010.basis: Formal under Rule 2 because PetSmart received this final bid along with revised versions of the merger agreement and other transaction documents.

evt_014.label: Formal
evt_014.basis: Formal under Rule 2 because each bidder submitted a revised draft of the merger agreement and other transaction agreements, and copies of their respective financing commitment documents.

evt_015.label: Formal
evt_015.basis: Formal under Rule 2 because each bidder submitted a revised draft of the merger agreement and other transaction agreements, and copies of their respective financing commitment documents.

cycle_1.basis: evt_009 is the first formal proposal in cycle_1; on December 10 PetSmart received the bid along with revised versions of the merger agreement and other transaction documents, satisfying Rule 2.

initiation_judgment.basis: The board had already initiated exploratory merger outreach in March 2014, and the August 13, 2014 decision to launch a sale exploration followed additional communications from stockholders and other interested parties.
initiation_judgment.source_text: In March, 2014, the board authorized management to contact Industry Participant to determine Industry Participant’s interest in initiating exploratory discussions concerning the feasibility of a merger or acquisition transaction. On August 13, 2014, the board met in person, together with members of management and representatives of J. P. Morgan and Wachtell Lipton, to complete its initial review of strategic and financial alternatives potentially available to the Company and to receive an update on communications from stockholders and other interested parties, including Industry Participant. As a result of this meeting, the board (1) determined to explore strategic alternatives (including a possible sale of the Company) for the Company to maximize value for stockholders including by commencing a process to determine the potential value that could be achieved via a sale of the Company;

advisor_jp_morgan.source_text: In July, after interviewing several potential financial advisors, the Company retained J. P. Morgan as financial advisor based on, among other factors, J. P. Morgan’s reputation, experience in mergers and acquisitions, valuation, financing and capital markets and its familiarity with the Company.

advisor_wachtell_lipton.source_text: At a meeting on June 18, 2014, the board reviewed, together with a financial advisor and with Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz (" Wachtell Lipton"), its legal advisor, the various strategic and financial alternatives potentially available to the Company and determined to explore more intensively potential changes to the Company’s capital structure, with a focus on returning capital to stockholders.

count_reconciliation.assertion: The board determined to allow the four bidders that had indicated a price or range at or above $80.00 per share to proceed to the final round of the sale process.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly when the grouped actor bidder_3 is counted using its extracted group_size of 2.
